'''Senali''' were the native [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Senali]]. They were an offshoot of [[Rutanian]]s from Rutan, and the rivalry between the two species was provoked by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] into war, leaving both Rutan and Senali weak and vulnerable to invasion.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Way of the Jedi]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
